headlines: Is AMD’s £2 Billion UK AI Bet Altering The Investment Case For Advanced Micro Devices (AMD)? Earlier this month, AMD announced plans to invest up to £2.00 billion in the UK over five years, alongside new AI supercomputing collaborations with Dell Technologies, the University of Cambridge and Oriole Networks that expand national research and AI infrastructure. By anchoring cutting-edge systems like the Zenith and Sunrise AI supercomputers and backing photonic-networked inference research, AMD is embedding its GPUs and CPUs at the core of the UK’s long-term AI and high‑performance...

headlines: Qorvo Merger With Skyworks Resets Debt Covenants And Risk Profile Qorvo (NasdaqGS:QRVO) has agreed to become a wholly owned subsidiary of Skyworks Solutions through a two step merger process. The transaction includes material amendments to Qorvo’s existing debt covenants, with required consents already obtained. The planned merger will change Qorvo’s corporate structure and financial obligations, with implications for stakeholders across its operations. Qorvo, a semiconductor solutions company focused on radio frequency and related technologies, operates...

The company also introduced new high efficiency power and gate driver technologies aimed at AI data centers, EV platforms, and industrial uses at PCIM Europe 2026.
